steps.desc: 标准化 compose.input 参数并生成输入目标 query
流式站点 title/subtitle fallback：先暂存，等 content 步一次性写入

action.conclusion: ${{ ({ action:'input', id:'', field: vars.composeCtx?.field || 'content', requestedField: vars.composeCtx?.requestedField || vars.composeCtx?.field || 'content', deferred:true, fallbackApplied:true, fallbackReason: vars.composeCtx?.fallbackReason || 'auto-fallback-deferred' }) }}

steps.desc: 检查当前页面是否已经有可输入目标
若当前无可输入目标，则先启动 compose.start
在流式站点 content 步合并暂存的 title/subtitle

args: ${{ ({ requestedField: vars.composeCtx.requestedField, streamComposeHost: vars.composeCtx.streamComposeHost, text: vars.composeCtx.text, inputClear: vars.composeCtx.inputClear }) }}

steps.desc: 目标字段不存在时，按 fieldPolicy 处理
构造字段降级（title/subtitle -> content）上下文
等待 fallback 后的 content 输入目标出现
按 fallback 策略写入 compose 文本
自动输入失败时请求用户手动输入

action.reason: 请在当前撰写编辑器中手动输入内容，完成后点击“已处理，继续”。

action.conclusion: ${{ ({ action:'input', id:'', field: (vars.composeCtxFallback?.field || vars.composeCtx?.field || 'content'), requestedField: vars.composeCtx?.requestedField || vars.composeCtx?.field || 'content', fieldPolicy: vars.composeCtx?.fieldPolicy || 'strict', fallbackApplied: !!(vars.composeCtxFallback || vars.composeCtx?.fallbackApplied), fallbackReason: vars.composeCtxFallback?.fallbackReason || vars.composeCtx?.fallbackReason || '', chars: String((vars.composeCtxFallback?.text || vars.preparedInput?.text || vars.composeCtx?.text || '')).length, by: vars.targetSel?.by || vars.targetSelWait?.by || vars.targetSelFallback?.by || null }) }}

${{ ({ action:'input', id:'', field: (vars.composeCtxFallback?.field || vars.composeCtx?.field || 'content'), requestedField: vars.composeCtx?.requestedField || vars.composeCtx?.field || 'content', fieldPolicy: vars.composeCtx?.fieldPolicy || 'strict', fallbackApplied: !!(vars.composeCtxFallback || vars.composeCtx?.fallbackApplied), fallbackReason: vars.composeCtxFallback?.fallbackReason || vars.composeCtx?.fallbackReason || '', chars: String((vars.composeCtxFallback?.text || vars.preparedInput?.text || vars.composeCtx?.text || '')).length, by: vars.targetSel?.by || vars.targetSelWait?.by || vars.targetSelFallback?.by || null, assisted: true }) }}

action.reason: compose.input target field not available on current site (requested=${vars.composeCtx.requestedField}, policy=${vars.composeCtx.fieldPolicy})

composeCtxFallback.desc: fallback 后的 compose 输入上下文

preparedInput.desc: 实际用于本次输入的文本/clear 参数
